{{Quote|The initial assault claimed 32 clones, all from the 43rd "Killer-Aiwha" Battalion, and there are three confirmed Jedi deaths: Dalnus Cam, Sana-Jis Ilowa, and Rallcema Bylissura.|HoloNet News Core Edition report|<ref name="HNN 14:9:01">{{InsiderCite|69|Republic HoloNet News Core Edition 14:9:01}}</ref>}}
'''Dalnus Cam''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] during the final decades of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

==Biography==
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]], Dalnus Cam [[Jedi training/Legends|trained]] by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]. Over time, Cam attained the rank of [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]].<ref name="BOJ" />

When the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] erupted across [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], Cam was assigned to assist in the massive [[Battle of Jabiim|defense]] of [[Jabiim/Legends|Jabiim]]. During the fighting, Cam was stationed at [[Shelter Base]] with fellow Jedi [[Rallcema Bylissura]] and [[Sana-Jis Ilowa]]. The Separatists ambushed the Jedi there and Cam was killed in the fighting.<ref name="BOJ" />

==Behind the scenes==
{{Quote|Yes, those are the three Jedi we see in the comic, but we never determined which name went to which character.|Leland Chee|<ref name="StarWars.com Message Boards">{{SWBoards|url=thread.jspa?threadID=152583&start=1545#16926420|thread=Holocron continuity database questions|user=[[Leland Chee|Leland Y Chee]]|date=2007-09-26|time=5:34 PM|quote=Yes, those are the three Jedi we see in the comic, but we never determined which name went to which character.}}</ref>}}
While not named in his only appearance in ''[[Star Wars: Republic: The Battle of Jabiim]]'', Cam was identified as one of the Jedi at Shelter Base in the ''[[Republic HoloNet News Core Edition 14:9:01]]''.<ref name="StarWars.com Message Boards" />
